scene: ___SCENE DESCRIPTION — setting, framing, lighting, wardrobe. Filled per video plan.___

dialogue.speaker: ___SPEAKER GENDER___
dialogue.delivery: Conversational and natural, like explaining something to a close friend sitting across from them. Speaks clearly with a confident but warm tone. Varies pace — slightly faster when building energy, slower when landing a key point. Brief natural pauses between thoughts. Not reading or reciting — speaking from conviction.

body: Sitting upright but relaxed, not stiff. Shoulders back and down, slight natural forward lean toward the camera — engaged with the viewer. Throughout the scene shifts subtly: leans forward slightly when emphasizing an important point, settles back when transitioning between thoughts, tilts head gently to one side when posing a question or showing empathy. A single deliberate nod when landing the main point. These movements are small and natural — not performative, not exaggerated.
hands: One hand rests on the desk surface as an anchor. The other hand does the talking — lifts naturally to gesture while speaking, keeping all movements between shoulders and waist. When introducing a topic or asking a question, opens palm facing up. When making a specific point, brings thumb and index finger together briefly. When listing things, counts casually with fingers. When dismissing something, gives a small wave to the side. Between gestures the hand returns to rest on the desk or in front. Every gesture is broad and simple — no complex finger positions, no frantic movement. Gestures like someone who talks with their hands naturally, not like someone performing.
face: Face is expressive but subtle, not exaggerated. Eyebrows lift slightly when asking a question or revealing something surprising. Brow furrows briefly when something is serious or concerning. A genuine warm smile when landing a positive point or connecting with the viewer. Between expressions the face is open, relaxed, and attentive — soft eyes, slight natural smile, keeps looking in the same direction. When pausing between thoughts, lips press together briefly as if gathering the next idea. Expressions match the emotional tone of the words. Everything is congruent.
negative_prompt: cartoonish eyes, bug eyes, exaggerated eye popping, unrealistic eye widening, stiff robotic posture, frozen mannequin, hands frozen in lap entire time, hands hidden, both hands gripping desk, monotone flat delivery, dead eyes, glazed expression, looking away from camera, wandering eyes, overly dramatic gestures, aggressive finger pointing, angry expression, background music, sound effects, explosion noises, whooshes, transition sounds, subtitles, captions, text overlays, words on screen, professional studio lighting, ring light, bokeh, beauty filter, airbrushed skin, 3d render, anime, illustration
